steps.title: Find the shared point
steps.content: Text 1 says Asimov's characters are flat and discuss ideas rather than emotions. Text 2 says Foundation largely consists of people discussing science and politics, with little revealed about their lives. Both authors therefore describe characters focused on intellectual matters without dispute.

steps.title: Separate fact from judgment
steps.content: A compares works in a way neither text does. B is disputed because Text 1 accepts the style criticism while Text 2 rejects it. D states a historical claim that Text 2 attributes to Asimov's theme but Text 1 never endorses. The answer is C.
